description: Alevtina Yakovenko hosts Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022, focusing on gaming directions and the Solana GamesKit. The panel features industry leaders discussing the future of Web3 gaming and digital ownership.
topic_summary: Day 3 of Breakpoint 2022 highlights gaming innovations in Web3, featuring discussions on Solana GamesKit and insights from leading developers in the gaming industry [t=85.74].
